session.user: Run this command and report results: make fast-ci Report any failures. This runs linting, type checking, and unit tests.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast CI checks: linting, type checking, and unit tests

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.
CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 Violations: 0 make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
=== Fast CI ===
--- Lint --- All checks passed!
--- Format Check --- Would reformat: packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/codespace/fake.py Would reformat: tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/test_setup_cmd.py 2 files would be reformatted, 1671 files already formatted
--- Prettier Check --- Checking formatting...
--- Markdown Check ---
--- Exec Reference Check --- OK: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date
... [108 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
## Results: make fast-ci - FAILED
**Exit code:** 2 (failure)
**Summary:** The CI check failed due to formatting issues.
### Failures:
**Format Check - 2 files need reformatting:**
1. `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/codespace/fake.py` 2. `tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/test_setup_cmd.py`
Additionally, there are 2 Prettier warnings: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
### All Other Checks Passed:
- Linting: All checks passed - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit tests (erk): 5,780 passed in 22.43s - Unit tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 4.47s - Unit tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed in 0.85s - Unit tests (erk-mcp): 24 passed
The failures are purely formatting-related. The code logic and tests are all passing. The two Python files need reformatting with Prettier/ruff, and the two markdown files have Prettier style issues.
